title: Task manager
description: Live Task-manager app window kind via ctx.registerWindowKind (extracted from core, #85). Enumerates real terminal/agent sessions cross-host, each expandable to its process tree, with End-process + Destroy-window actions. Session RPC (/session/procs + the DESTRUCTIVE /session/kill, incl. the 409 session_gone destroy success path) rides the host-aware ctx.session capability. Ephemeral — never persisted across reloads.
author: JohnConnorNPC
